title: Verify local artifact and diagnostic protection
preconditions: Published executable on a supported encrypted-volume host plus canary descriptions, identifiers, credentials, and payloads.
steps: Run normal, failure, backup, restore, evolution, and skill flows; inspect modes for data root and every artifact; scan stdout exclusions, stderr, logs, and manifests for canaries.
expected: Data root is 0700; all financial artifacts are 0600; host protection gate is validated; no non-data-return output contains protected canaries or serialized payloads.
